patches.summary: Add Strategy 3 (nested-data envelope) to extractPageItems so JSend-style {success, data: {<plural>: [...]}} responses yield items.
patches.reason: Pangolin's list endpoints return a two-level envelope. The generator-emitted single-level extractor returned zero items, causing silent zero-row syncs. Upstream issue: mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#2013.

patches.summary: Add nested-data envelope unwrap to writeListResponseToStore so read-command upserts persist rows from JSend-style responses.
patches.reason: Mirrors the sync.go fix in the read-command upsert path. Without it, every `org sites get` / `org resources get` warned '1/N items skipped (no extractable ID field found)'. Upstream issue: mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#2013.

patches.summary: Populate resourceIDFieldOverrides with Pangolin's typed primary keys (siteId, resourceId, domainId, clientId, targetId, roleId, idpId, accessTokenId, certId).
patches.reason: Generator emits an empty map; Pangolin's resources use typed *Id PKs rather than the generic `id`. Without these entries, the store's typed upsert path can't resolve primary keys and falls back to skipping rows. Upstream issue: mvanhorn/cli-printing-press#2016.
